overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a period crime game depicting a 1930s industrial city district. The player walks along sidewalks past red brick warehouses and factories, navigating through vintage automobile traffic and streetcars under a clear sky.

events.description: large green military truck drives past on the street
red and cream streetcar passes by on the tracks

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the concrete sidewalk past brick industrial buildings and utility poles

notable_agents.action: man in brown vest and cap leaning against the brick wall
yellow vintage truck driving along the street

entered.detail: tall red brick industrial building with arched windows running along the right side
painted sign on building reading BOARD AND SHIPPING
wooden telephone poles with multiple cross-arms and wires
metal streetcar tracks embedded in the asphalt road
network of electrical wires crisscrossing above the street

segments.scene_description: Walking along a concrete sidewalk beside a red brick warehouse district. The camera passes NPCs leaning against walls while vintage trucks and a streetcar move along the multi-lane road. Overhead power lines and wooden utility poles line the street under a clear blue sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial intersection with multiple streetcar tracks

events.description: steps off the sidewalk and enters the wide intersection
vintage cars and trucks cross the intersection in different directions

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at the intersection while looking around at the traffic

notable_agents.action: black vintage sedan driving through the intersection
blue delivery van crossing the intersection

entered.detail: wide asphalt intersection with painted crosswalk lines and streetcar track crossings
decorative green iron fence with stone posts along the sidewalk edge
massive multi-story brick factory building with many windows

segments.scene_description: Navigating a wide sunlit intersection surrounded by industrial buildings. The camera crosses the asphalt while vintage automobiles and trucks drive through. An ornate iron fence appears on the left as the camera moves toward the opposite sidewalk.

events.description: ground surface changes from concrete to cobblestone brick pavement
camera tilts upward to look at the tall factory smokestacks emitting smoke

agents.ego_description: continuing down the cobblestone sidewalk past industrial buildings and a blue mailbox

notable_agents.action: woman in dark dress walking toward the camera on the sidewalk
green vintage truck parked along the curb

entered.detail: dark blue postal mailbox standing on the cobblestone sidewalk
tall white concrete industrial wall with large garage doors
tall brick smokestacks emitting dark smoke into the sky
metal fire escape stairs attached to the brick building facade

segments.scene_description: Walking along a cobblestone sidewalk with a white concrete industrial wall on the left and brick warehouses on the right. The camera passes a blue mailbox and pedestrians while approaching a massive factory complex with tall smokestacks billowing smoke. The ground is wet in patches reflecting the sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a 1930s industrial district, moving from a bustling warehouse street toward a massive, smoking factory complex. It begins along a concrete sidewalk beside red brick warehouses, passing idling NPCs and vintage trucks as a streetcar glides beneath a network of overhead power lines. As the camera reaches a wide, sunlit intersection, the view opens up to cross the asphalt amidst a flow of period automobiles before passing an ornate iron fence. The scene then shifts onto a cobblestone path flanked by a white concrete wall and brick buildings, passing a blue mailbox and pedestrians. Finally, the camera advances over patches of wet, reflective ground toward a towering factory complex with smokestacks billowing smoke into the clear blue sky.
